name: stepglyph
description: Turn Codex Computer Use sessions into editable visual guides.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @stepglyph/core && npm run build -w @stepglyph/recorder-server && npm run build -w @stepglyph/studio && npm run build -w @stepglyph/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @stepglyph/core && npm run typecheck -w @stepglyph/recorder-server && npm run typecheck -w @stepglyph/studio && npm run typecheck -w @stepglyph/cli
